content:
I Built a Modern Dashboard Widgets Pack for React & Next.js

Over the past few weeks, I designed and built a collection of reusable dashboard components for modern SaaS applications.

What’s included?

• ✅ 50+ reusable dashboard widgets

• ✅ React + Next.js

• ✅ TypeScript

• ✅ Tailwind CSS

• ✅ Responsive layouts

• ✅ Dark mode support

• ✅ Clean and reusable code

The goal was simple:

Instead of rebuilding the same dashboard UI over and over again, developers can quickly integrate these components into their own projects and customize them as needed.

I’d really appreciate any feedback from the DEV community.

🚀 Launch Offer

To celebrate the launch, the product is available for $39 for a limited time before returning to its regular price

🔗 Product: [https://lynala.gumroad.com/l/dashboard-widgets]

Thanks for reading
